info.title: Dashboard SOC API
info.description:
SOC Ticketing System backend API. All responses are wrapped in a {success, message?, data?, error?, meta?} envelope.

Auth: use Bearer JWT access tokens in the Authorization header.

Notes:
- /api/v1/auth/register is intended for SOC_MANAGER to create L1/L2 analysts.
- Bootstrapping the first SOC_MANAGER account is out-of-band (DB seed/manual insert).

payload_first.description: Snapshot of the first raw payload in the group

payload_last.description: Snapshot of the last raw payload in the group

indicators.description: Key/value indicators that will be stored into ticket_iocs

raw_log.description: Raw log payload stored into ticket_raw_logs.raw_payload

AdminUpdateAnalystRequest.description: SOC_MANAGER-only. Update an existing L1/L2 analyst. At least one field must be provided.

RevokeUserSessionsRequest.description: Optional payload. Omit session_id to revoke all active sessions, or provide session_id to revoke one active session.

message.example: Status tiket berhasil diubah dan log tersimpan.

get.description: Return role-based dashboard aggregates for the authenticated user. Use either range (e.g. 24h, 7d) or from/to (RFC3339) to define the activity window.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Activity window duration (supports Go duration like 24h or day shorthand like 7d). Ignored if from/to are provided. Default: 24h.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start (RFC3339). Must be provided together with to.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end (RFC3339). Must be provided together with from.

parameters.name: recent_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent tickets returned (1-50). Default: 10.

post.description: Authenticate with username/password and receive access + refresh tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and new refresh token.
Change the current user's password. Revokes all refresh tokens after a successful change.

patch.description: SOC_MANAGER-only. Update an analyst (L1/L2) user's full_name, username, role, and/or password.

post.description: SOC_MANAGER-only endpoint to create L1/L2 analyst accounts.

get.description: SOC_MANAGER-only. Return user detail including sessions and ticket logs.

delete.description: SOC_MANAGER-only. Delete an existing L1/L2 analyst account.

post.description: SOC_MANAGER-only. Revoke refresh sessions of a target user. Omit session_id to revoke all active sessions, or provide session_id to revoke one active session.

patch.description: Update ticket status and persist a ticket log note.

post.description: Triggers external AI analysis for a ticket using /api/v1/analyze/go contract, stores parsed analysis output to database, and records an audit log note.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Emits 'notification' events with NotificationListItem JSON payload, and periodic 'ping' events.
SOC_MANAGER-only export. Exports tickets in a time window including audit logs, IOCs, analysis, recommendations, and raw payload (nested fields are serialized as JSON columns).

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Window duration (e.g. 24h, 7d). Ignored if from/to are provided. Default: 7d.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start (RFC3339). Must be provided together with to.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end (RFC3339). Must be provided together with from.

get.description: SOC_MANAGER-only export. Generates a PDF report for tickets in a time window.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Window duration (e.g. 24h, 7d). Ignored if from/to are provided. Default: 7d.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start (RFC3339). Must be provided together with to.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end (RFC3339). Must be provided together with from.

post.description: API-key protected endpoint used by the Wazuh/LLM pipeline to create/update tickets, store raw logs, analysis, recommendations, IOCs, and create notifications for all users.
API-key protected batch endpoint to ingest raw logs and group them into tickets by time window.
